image_provider_status: No external image-generation provider or MCP resource was configured in this environment.
global_visual_style: no text unless the asset is the logo

assets.purpose: Primary logo for menu and repository branding.
assets.prompt_subject: stylized Markov's Maze logo with a rune-ring motif and elegant stone fantasy lettering
assets.consistency_notes: Keep gold and teal rune accents aligned with the rest of the UI; the logo is the only art asset allowed to contain text.

assets.purpose: Main menu backdrop with strong title readability.
assets.prompt_subject: wide ruins courtyard seen from a puzzle-friendly top-down orthographic angle, broken columns, glowing runes, broad negative space for menu UI
assets.consistency_notes: Use warm torchlight and teal rune light to establish the fantasy ruins mood without adding gameplay objects.

assets.purpose: Level-select backdrop with implied route progression.
assets.prompt_subject: ruined stone map hall with inset maze slabs, corridor fragments, and subtle glowing rune pathways
assets.consistency_notes: Keep the center and lower thirds calm so level nodes can sit on top without readability loss.

assets.purpose: Gameplay backdrop behind the active maze board.
assets.prompt_subject: subdued ancient ruins floor plane with low-contrast stone geometry, faint rune circles, and soft edge vignette
assets.consistency_notes: Prioritize quiet values so the maze tiles, sprites, and overlays remain dominant.

assets.purpose: Primary looping parallax strip for long ruins vistas.
assets.prompt_subject: long horizontal ruined skyline with arches, pillars, banners, and layered rune-lit stone silhouettes
assets.consistency_notes: Designed as a horizontal strip for later parallax reuse; keep silhouettes rhythmic and loop-friendly.

assets.purpose: Secondary looping parallax strip for variation.
assets.prompt_subject: alternate long horizontal ruined skyline with collapsed towers, moonlit masonry, and cooler rune glows
assets.consistency_notes: Use the same silhouette language as the primary strip but shift the lighting and ruin density.

assets.prompt_subject: single stone floor tile with broad slabs and a faint circular rune seam
assets.consistency_notes: All maze tiles should stay readable at gameplay zoom, with clean edge contrast and rune detailing kept secondary to pathing clarity.

assets.prompt_subject: single stone floor tile with offset slab seams and minimal moss detail
assets.consistency_notes: All maze tiles should stay readable at gameplay zoom, with clean edge contrast and rune detailing kept secondary to pathing clarity.

assets.prompt_subject: transparent path overlay with a thin glowing patrol line across a tile
assets.consistency_notes: Probability and path overlays should read instantly above tiles, using high contrast, transparent backgrounds, and restrained rune styling.

assets.prompt_subject: collapsed stone column segment with cracked rune bands
assets.consistency_notes: Props should feel like maze dressing, not blockers, and should stay compact enough to read against the floor.

assets.prompt_subject: floating or fallen rune shard crystal carved from pale stone

assets.prompt_subject: soft moss fringe that can sit along a stone edge without blocking readability

assets.prompt_subject: ruins scholar seen from top-down, calm idle stance, parchment robe, teal sash, satchel
assets.consistency_notes: Keep the ruins scholar silhouette consistent across all player assets: parchment robe, teal sash, dark hair, bronze satchel, and readable top-down pose.

assets.prompt_subject: 2-frame top-down ruins scholar idle animation with subtle breathing and cloth shift
assets.consistency_notes: Keep the ruins scholar silhouette consistent across all player assets: parchment robe, teal sash, dark hair, bronze satchel, and readable top-down pose.

assets.consistency_notes: Keep the ruins scholar silhouette consistent across all player assets: parchment robe, teal sash, dark hair, bronze satchel, and readable top-down pose.

assets.prompt_subject: cursed knight seen from top-down, dark plate armor, glowing visor slit, rune cracks in the armor
